chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ: "مَنْ شَرِبَ اَلْخَمْرَ فَسَكِرَ مِنْهَا لَمْ تُقْبَلْ لَهُ صَلاَةٌ أَرْبَعِينَ يَوْماً فَإِنْ تَرَكَ اَلصَّلاَةَ فِي هَذِهِ اَلْأَيَّامِ ضُوعِفَ عَلَيْهِ اَلْعَذَابُ لِتَرْكِهِ اَلصَّلاَةَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4950 - Aban ibn Uthman narrated from al-Fudayl ibn Yasar, who said:
I heard Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) say:
"Whoever drinks alcohol and becomes intoxicated by it, his prayer will not be accepted for forty days. And if he abandons prayer during these days, his punishment will be doubled for neglecting the prayer."
